name: Browned Parsnips
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub parsnips clean.
2. Drop into lightly salted, boiling water.
3. Cook for 20 to 30 minutes, or until tender.
4. Drain the parsnips.
5. Scrape off the skin and split lengthwise.
6. Pull out the stringy cores.
7. Dip pieces in flour.
8. Fry in fat until golden brown.
9. Alternatively, mash the parsnips after removing the cores.
10. Season and form into small cakes before frying.
